retrieved_result: Solar power surging to forefront of Canadian energy Richard Blackwell Published July 26, 2014Updated June 19, 2017Dave Chan for The Globe and Mail In what was once a rocky hayfield in southeastern Ontario, a very 21st-century type of farm is taking shape.
